issues.description: Missing condition for card placement requirement. The effect requires placing 'this Character and 1 [Kin'emon] with 0 power from your trash at the bottom of your deck' as a cost before playing the Kin'emon. This is not captured in the DSL.
Filter uses 'maxCost' but should use 'cost' with exact value of 6, not a range. The card specifies 'cost of 6', not 'up to 6'.
Action is missing quantity constraint 'up to 1'. The filter should include a quantity limit.
